transcript: Hi everyone. Um, I'm Alizee Carli, Senior Advisor at B2C2 and it's really a great honor to be here today with the Solana community. So, B2C2 and Solana have been partners for a long time. Indeed, we share a similar view about the future of stablecoins and the role that we want to play together in that future. So, today, stablecoins make up about 300 billion dollars in market cap. With tens of billions of dollars moving globally. But they started really as an on and off ramp for crypto trading, and now they're transferring into a global, uh, financial asset. Why? Well, I don't have to tell you. By design, they move instantly, they're global, they settle instantly, and the cost of issuing and operating them is cheaper than ever as the technology has matured significantly. Regulatory clarity is also progressing, including here in the UAE, which really supports that adoption. Our second shared belief. We think the number of stablecoins will increase dramatically. So what you're gonna see is banks, payment providers, fintechs, even global retailers eventually operating their own stablecoin. But here's the catch. That diversity of stablecoins come with operational complexity. Indeed, you know, protocols like Solana, companies, they will want to trade in as many stablecoins as possible. But they will not want to manage the treasury that comes with it. So in essence, what we believe is that we'll transact in many but settle in a few. And that's why fungibility is so important to make this landscape really workable. For, you know, adoption and users in the real economy, you need an environment where you can swap between stablecoins at very low cost, instantly and with deep liquidity. And, you know, this is where the alignment between Solana and B2C2 is the strongest. You have on one side Solana, which is the fastest, most efficient execution layer for global on-chain finance, and on the other side B2C2, which provide institutional grade liquidity for crypto and stablecoins. And together, they really make this whole infrastructure workable and scalable. So with that said, I'm very excited to introduce you our new product Penny. So Penny is an institutional grade, zero fee, uh, stablecoin swap facility. It is designed for this world of multiplication of stablecoins and the need for deep liquidity and scalability. So what what Penny offers is instant settlement, on-chain. Zero fees, so there is a bid-ask spread but you have no hidden fees on top of it. 24/7 liquidity. Multi-chain support, Solana of course, but also Ethereum and Tron. Institutional grade infrastructure, um, this is done via API. And a multitude of stablecoins being supported. And of course, um, as time goes we're adding more and more stablecoins that are com becoming prominent. So this is the world that we propose to offer with Solana and B2C2. A combination of a very efficient execution layer on-chain for global finance, that's Solana, and deep liquidity and institutional grade liquidity for this the scaling of stablecoins. Thank you for your attention and don't hesitate to reach out to our team.

enrichment.generated_query: Penny B2C2 Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog OR technical docs

sources.title: RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
sources.snippet:
RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
[![RISE Labs](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/2025/02/Rise_Light-Logotype@2x.png)](https://blog.risechain.com)
[Sign in](#/portal/signin)[Subscribe](#/portal/signup)
[News](https://blog.risechain.com/tag/news/)Featured
# RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
* [![Sasha Mai](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/size/w100/2025/04/IMG_0302.JPG)](https://blog.risechain.com/author/sasha/)
#### [Sasha Mai](https://blog.risechain.com/author/sasha/)
11 Nov 2025•2 min read
![RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/size/w2000/2025/11/Acquisition-3.png)
*BSX Labs, backed by Blockchain Capital and Coinbase Ventures, brings expertise from supporting over $15B in orderbook trading volume. The team will help RISE develop EVM-based synchronously composable orderbook primitives that will bridge traditional financial markets.*
**Singapore –November 11, 2025**–[RISE](http://risechain.com/?ref=blog.risechain.com)today announced its acquisition of BSX Labs, the team behind the BSX perpetuals exchange on the Base network.
The BSX team’s experience in designing and operating a hybrid orderbook trading system positions RISE to accelerate innovation in fully onchain orderbook products, a core use case of RISE’s high-speed Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain. This collaboration will deliver Integrated Orderbook Primitives that benefit from synchronous composability with other DeFi applications, higher speed and throughput, and increased compatibility between blockchain and traditional financial markets; opening new opportunities for both retail and institutional users as well as app developers.
> "The BSX team built an impressive trading engine that attracted significant volume and a loyal user base," said **> Sam Battenally, CEO of RISE
**> . "Integrating their technology and talent is a key strategic step for us. It accelerates our roadmap towards launching a native, best-in-class orderbook infrastructure on RISE."
The market is yet to see fully composable orderbooks onchain and at scale. Existing solutions are either fragmented with custom execution, or the underlying chain cannot support such scale. With the immense forecasted growth of stablecoins and tokenization, RISE, together with the BSX team, is taking an opinionated bet that integrated perps and spot orderbooks will be the preferred infrastructure for brokers, asset issuers and retail traders.
With Integrated Orderbooks, retail brokers get access to deep liquidity, asset issuers can list spot and perps instruments for their assets; and users get access to the best execution, new assets and net-new DeFi yield opportunities.
BSX launched in 2023 and processed over $15B in cumulative trading volume. The acquisition will provide a path forward for BSX token holders, who will be eligible for an airdrop of RISE’s upcoming native token, with 1.5% of the RISE token total supply allocated to BSX tokens currently in circulation in the market.
> "Joining RISE is an incredible opportunity for our team and our community," said **> Avi, CEO of BSX Labs
**> . "We share a vision for a more performant and transparent onchain trading future. With the resources and ecosystem of RISE, we can now build that future at a much larger scale."
As part of the integration, the BSX decentralized exchange (DEX) will be sunsetted in a structured one-week process. The shutdown of the BSX DEX will commence on November 11, 2025 at 15:00 UTC. Users are advised to visit the[BSX blog](https://mirror.xyz/bsx.eth?ref=blog.risechain.com)for instructions on closing positions and withdrawing assets, and for further details.
**About BSX Labs:**
BSX Labs was the developer of the BSX Protocol, a decentralized perpetuals e

[Crypto](https://fortune.com/section/crypto/)[Coinbase](https://fortune.com/tag/coinbase/)
# Exclusive: Coinbase to buy Solana trading platform Vector.fun
By
[Ben Weiss](https://fortune.com/author/ben-weiss/)
Ben Weiss
Crypto Reporter
Down Arrow Button Icon
By
[Ben Weiss](https://fortune.com/author/ben-weiss/)
Ben Weiss
Crypto Reporter
Down Arrow Button Icon
November 21, 2025, 8:00 AM ET
Add us on
![Brian Armstrong, cofounder and CEO of Coinbase](https://fortune.com/img-assets/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/GettyImages-2059253653-1-e1763729514425.jpg?format=webp&w=1440&q=100)
Brian Armstrong, cofounder and CEO of CoinbaseJason Armond—Los Angeles Times/Getty Images
The U.S. crypto exchange[Coinbase](https://fortune.com/company/coinbase/)plans to buy yet another company in what’s become one of its most aggressive years on record for M&A. The crypto giant has agreed to acquire the[Solana](https://www.binance.com/en/price/solana)trading platform Vector.fun, Max Branzburg, Coinbase’s vice president of product management, told*Fortune*. The deal is expected to close by the end of the year. Branzburg declined to disclose the acquisition terms.
Recommended Video
Vector.fun is a decentralized exchange on the blockchain Solana. The product’s users primarily trade memecoins and can follow other traders’ bets and investments. As part of the acquisition, Coinbase will shut down Vector.fun’s mobile and desktop trading apps, and hire the platform’s 13 employees.
Coinbase plans to use Vector.fun’s technology to expand the assets its users can trade on its app through decentralized exchanges. (This feature is separate from Coinbase’s core business of centralized trading.) Currently, the company only lets users trade tokens through exchanges built on top of Base, Coinbase’s own blockchain. The crypto exchange hopes to expand access to Solana, said Branzburg.
“The Coinbase app is really meant to be an agnostic platform to enable people to trade all of the assets they want to trade,” he added, referencing the company’s efforts to become what it calls the “everything exchange.”
## M&A frenzy
Coinbase’s acquisition of Vector.fun is its ninth[purchase](https://fortune.com/crypto/2025/07/02/coinbase-liquifi-acquisition-mergers-acquisitions-crypto-industry/)in 2025, three times its haul the year prior. And it’s laying out serious cash. In May, it[struck](https://fortune.com/crypto/2025/05/08/coinbase-derebit-q1-earnings-profit-drop-diversification/)a deal to buy crypto derivatives exchange Deribit for $2.9 billion. In October, it[paid](https://www.coinbase.com/blog/coinbase-acquires-echo-unlocking-the-future-of-onchain-capital-formation)$375 million for initial coin offering platform Echo. And it also[explored](https://fortune.com/crypto/2025/10/09/bvnk-acquisition-coinbase-mastercard-stablecoins/)an acquisition of stablecoin company BVNK for around $2 billion, a deal that both companies eventually[called off](https://fortune.com/2025/11/11/coinbase-bvnk-2-billion-deal-falls-through-stablecoins/)in November.
“We’re seeing a lot of those opportunities where companies are just hitting a level of maturity, and technology is hitting a level of maturity where it makes sense for them to look to join forces with Coinbase,” said Branzburg.
While the crypto exchange weathered a tough 2022 and 2023 where it posted little to no profits, it rode the crypto bull market to build out its balance sheet w

tags.impact_reason: B2C2's Penny offers zero-fee stablecoin swaps with institutional-grade liquidity, which significantly enhances Solana's DeFi capabilities and institutional appeal.

This machine visually represents the story's central concept of 'transact in many, settle in a few' by taking a chaotic input of diverse coins and outputting a single, unified stream. The diegetic text '0 FEE' is integrated as a holographic projection on the machine, directly highlighting the 'zero-fee' value proposition mentioned in the standfirst, which is a key feature for the institutional audience.
visual_idea.description: In a minimalist, dark server room, a sleek, chrome and glass institutional swap engine stands as the central focus. A cascade of diverse, semi-translucent, glowing coins—each a different color—pours into a funnel at the top. Inside the machine's visible acrylic tubes, these coins are sorted and converted. From a slot at the bottom, a single, organized stream of uniform, brightly glowing Solana-teal coins is dispensed. On the machine's polished chrome surface, a small, crisp holographic display projects the words '0 FEE' in a cool blue light. The background is deep and out of focus, with soft bokeh lights from distant server racks.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, sleek, chrome and translucent acrylic institutional swap engine stands as the central, epic focus in a minimalist, dark server room, towering with significant height and ample negative space above. A vibrant cascade of diverse, semi-translucent, glowing coins, each a different color, pours into a prominent funnel at the top of the machine. Within the machine's visible, crystal-clear acrylic tubes, these luminous coins are meticulously sorted and converted. From a designated slot at the bottom, a single, organized stream of uniform, brightly glowing Solana-teal coins is dispensed. On the machine's highly polished chrome surface, a small, crisp holographic display projects the words '0 FEE' in a cool blue light, integrated seamlessly into the design. The background is deep, out of focus, and dark, featuring soft bokeh lights from distant server racks. The entire scene is lit with High-Key Studio Lighting, utilizing Soft Commercial Product Lighting with Global Illumination, a Neutral White (5500K) key light from a Large Diffused Softbox, and a White Reflector to fill shadows, creating bright, even studio lighting that casts subtle, soft gradient shadows, emphasizing every detail of the engine's polished chrome and translucent acrylic elements. The composition emphasizes verticality and an imposing scale. 8k, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), hyper-detailed, clean design, professional presentation.

The diegetic text '0 FEE' is integrated as a holographic projection on the machine, directly highlighting the 'zero-fee' value proposition mentioned in the standfirst, which is a key feature for the institutional audience.

A chaotic, vibrant mix of dozens of different glowing, glass-like coins (representing various stablecoins) are caught in a vortex, about to be drawn into the sorting mechanism. The intricate design and different engraved symbols on each coin type are visible, emphasizing the market's fragmentation before the swap. The lighting is focused, catching the polished chrome edges of the funnel and the internal glow of the coins.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, top-down view focusing on the machine's input funnel. A chaotic, vibrant mix of dozens of different glowing, translucent acrylic coins (representing various stablecoins) are caught in a dynamic vortex, meticulously rendered with a soft, yet intense glow from high-key studio lighting, precisely highlighting micro-details, as if illuminated by a large side softbox combined with a gold reflector. These glass-like coins, each with intricate, deeply engraved symbols, emphasize the market's fragmentation before the swap. The focused lighting catches the highly polished chrome edges of the funnel, which exhibits precise engineering and the robust aesthetic of 'The Engine', and amplifies the internal glow of the coins. Composed for a perfect 1:1 square aspect ratio, with strong symmetry and central focus, filling the frame entirely with rich textures. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed.

editorial.headline: B2C2 Launches Institutional Stablecoin Swap Engine 'PENNY' on Solana
editorial.standfirst: Liquidity giant B2C2 addresses the fragmentation of the $300B stablecoin market with a new zero-fee swap facility. The move enables institutions to "transact in many, settle in a few" by combining Solana's execution speed with deep off-chain liquidity.
key_takeaways: **Product Debut:** **PENNY** delivers instant, zero-fee swaps (bid-ask only) for assets like **USDC**, **USDT**, and **PYUSD**.
**Scale:** **B2C2** leverages its institutional liquidity to solve treasury fragmentation for banks and fintechs.
**Infrastructure:** The facility integrates **Solana** as the primary execution layer alongside support for **Ethereum** and **Tron**.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Stablecoins are rapidly transitioning from crypto on-ramps to global financial instruments, with the market cap now exceeding **$300 billion**. However, this growth has introduced a new challenge for institutions: operational complexity. As banks, payment providers, and retailers prepare to issue their own tokens, the liquidity landscape is becoming increasingly fragmented.

**B2C2** has responded with **PENNY**, an institutional-grade swap facility designed to restore fungibility to this fractured market. The core thesis is simple: while protocols and companies need to transact in a multitude of stablecoins to serve users, they should not be forced to manage the treasury risks associated with holding them all. PENNY allows these entities to "transact in many, settle in a few," effectively abstracting away the complexity of multi-asset management.

The architecture relies on a strategic symbiosis between **Solana** and B2C2. Alizee Carli, Senior Advisor at B2C2, highlighted that Solana provides the necessary "fastest, most efficient execution layer," while B2C2 supplies the deep, 24/7 liquidity required for institutional settlement. This combination ensures that swaps are not only cost-efficient—charging only the bid-ask spread with no hidden fees—but also settle instantly on-chain, a critical requirement for real-world economy adoption.

Looking ahead, the facility is built to scale with the market. Currently supporting major chains including **Ethereum** and **Tron**, PENNY is API-driven and designed to integrate seamlessly into existing banking and fintech stacks. As regulatory clarity improves in jurisdictions like the **UAE**, the platform positions itself as the plumbing for a future where stablecoins underpin global commerce.
